name: nasa-tlx-test-harness
description: Test framework for NASA-TLX cognitive load prediction from accessibility barriers. Maps detected issues to workload dimensions and validates predictions against developer ratings.

scripts.run:all: npm run run:llm:all-conditions -- --fixtures html-high,css-high,js-high,tsx-high --model kimi-k2.5:cloud,gpt-oss:120b-cloud,qwen3.5:397b-cloud && npm run run:voting:kimi-qwen -- --fixtures html-high,css-high,js-high,tsx-high && npm run run:voting:kimi-gpt -- --fixtures html-high,css-high,js-high,tsx-high && npm run run:voting:3models -- --fixtures html-high,css-high,js-high,tsx-high

author: Dissertation: AI Accessibility Assistant
